metadata.description: Curated 15-event benchmark dataset for LLM Prediction Market Ensemble research
metadata.source: Kalshi API (api.elections.kalshi.com) + Kalshi public market data
metadata.notes: Window prices are approximated from last traded prices and market history. Tickers confirmed from Kalshi API where available.

events.title: US Q3 2024 real GDP growth rate
events.question: Will real GDP increase by more than 2.9% in Q3 2024?
events.description: Bureau of Economic Analysis advance estimate of Q3 2024 real GDP annualized growth rate, released October 30, 2024. Actual result: 2.8% (below 2.9% threshold).

events.title: US Q3 2024 real GDP growth rate
events.question: Will real GDP increase by more than 2.4% in Q3 2024?
events.description: Bureau of Economic Analysis advance estimate of Q3 2024 real GDP annualized growth rate, released October 30, 2024. Actual result: 2.8% (above 2.4% threshold).

events.title: US Q2 2024 real GDP growth rate
events.question: Will real GDP increase by more than 2.4% in Q2 2024?
events.description: Bureau of Economic Analysis advance estimate of Q2 2024 real GDP annualized growth rate, released July 25, 2024. Actual result: 2.8% (above 2.4% threshold).

events.title: 2024 US Presidential Election
events.question: Will Donald Trump win the 2024 US Presidential Election?
events.description: 2024 US Presidential Election held November 5, 2024. Major candidates: Donald Trump (R) vs Kamala Harris (D).

events.title: 2024 US Senate Control
events.question: Will Republicans control the US Senate after the 2024 election?
events.description: Control of the US Senate following the November 2024 elections. Republicans gained seats to take majority control.

events.title: FOMC September 2024 rate decision
events.question: Will the Fed cut rates by 50 basis points at the September 2024 meeting?
events.description: Federal Reserve FOMC meeting September 17-18, 2024. The Fed cut rates by 50bp, its first cut since 2020.

events.title: Who will the next Pope be?
events.question: Will Robert Prevost be elected as the next Pope?
events.description: Following the death of Pope Francis on April 21, 2025, the College of Cardinals convened to elect a successor. Robert Prevost was elected Pope Leo XIV on May 8, 2025.

events.title: Which G7 leader will leave office next?
events.question: Will Shigeru Ishiba be the next G7 leader to leave office?
events.description: Prediction market on which G7 leader (US, UK, France, Germany, Italy, Canada, Japan) would leave office next. Japan's PM Shigeru Ishiba left office.

events.title: Will Klarna or Stripe IPO first?
events.question: Will Klarna IPO before Stripe?
events.description: Prediction market on whether fintech company Klarna would complete its IPO before Stripe. Klarna IPO'd first in 2025.

events.title: Super Bowl LX Winner
events.question: Will the Seattle Seahawks win Super Bowl LX?
events.description: Super Bowl LX played February 2026. Seattle Seahawks defeated the New England Patriots 29-13. Kalshi processed $871M in trading volume.

events.title: Giannis Antetokounmpo trade deadline
events.question: Will Giannis Antetokounmpo be traded by the NBA trade deadline?
events.description: NBA trade deadline February 2026. $23M wagered on Kalshi. Giannis was not traded.

events.title: 2024-25 NFL Season: Kansas City Chiefs Super Bowl appearance
events.question: Will the Kansas City Chiefs appear in Super Bowl LX?
events.description: Whether the Kansas City Chiefs, defending champions, would make it back to the Super Bowl. They did not qualify for Super Bowl LX.

events.title: 97th Academy Awards Best Picture
events.question: Will Anora win Best Picture at the 2025 Oscars?
events.description: 97th Academy Awards ceremony held March 2, 2025. Anora, directed by Sean Baker, won Best Picture.

events.title: 67th Grammy Awards Album of the Year
events.question: Will Beyonce win Album of the Year at the 2025 Grammys?
events.description: 67th Grammy Awards ceremony held February 2, 2025. Beyonce's Cowboy Carter won Album of the Year.

events.title: 2025 Golden Globes Best Motion Picture Drama
events.question: Will The Brutalist win Best Motion Picture Drama at the 2025 Golden Globes?
events.description: 82nd Golden Globe Awards ceremony held January 5, 2025. The Brutalist won Best Motion Picture Drama.
